All instance actions are proxied to the context * * @return LogContext Context for this LogInstance */ protected function proxy(): LogContext { if (!$this->context) { $this->context = new LogContext( $this->version, $this->solution['serviceSid'], $this->solution['environmentSid'], $this->solution['sid'] ); } return $this->context; } /** * Fetch the LogInstance * * @return LogInstance Fetched LogInstance * @throws TwilioException When an HTTP error occurs. */ public function fetch(): LogInstance { return $this->proxy()->fetch(); } /** * Magic getter to access properties * * @param string $name Property to access * @return mixed The requested property * @throws TwilioException For unknown properties */ public function __get(string $name) { if (\array_key_exists($name, $this->properties)) { return $this->properties[$name]; } if (\property_exists($this, '_' . $name)) { $method = 'get' . \ucfirst($name); return $this->$method(); } throw new TwilioException('Unknown property: ' . $name); } /** * Provide a friendly representation * * @return string Machine friendly representation */ public function __toString(): string { $context = []; foreach ($this->solution as $key => $value) { $context[] = "$key=$value"; } return '[Twilio.Serverless.V1.LogInstance ' . \implode(' ', $context) .
